race_meta.race_name: Midnite A Next Generation Betting App Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed wasthatok at position 3 (16.0% probability) vs top pick Prince Quattro (38.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~22.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Prince Quattro > Tuba, but actual result was Wasthatok > Tuba. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Wasthatok had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -4.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
